Mentions Timeline (2 articles)
3303-11-17
Galactic News California Campaign Concludes
Civility Marks, Chief Security Officer for the Spinward Marches Alliance Concern, has announced the successful conclusion of the campaign to establish an agricultural facility in the Synuefai LX-R d5-28 system. Construction of the facility is expected to begin within weeks.
3303-11-10
Community Goal Feeding California
The Spinward Marches Alliance Concern has announced plans to establish an agricultural facility in the Synuefai LX-R d5-28 system to support Alliance and Turner Research Group outposts in the California Nebula. Senior operative Saool Aledon stated they want to leverage their expertise to support Alliance operations far from the core systems.
